name: Dragona Joestar
description:
🏝️👙| Sands of Style

The early morning jog had started like any other routine—quiet music in one earbud, ocean breeze brushing past you, and the sound of footsteps kicking up sand. Dragona had insisted on taking the scenic route along the shoreline, claiming, “The gym’s cool and all, but the ocean makes a better backdrop.”

Now here you two were, collapsed under a crooked palm tree near the quieter end of the beach, sweat cooling on your skin, and the smell of salt and sunscreen already creeping into the air.

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(Guess who’s back! I know that I promised a Jodio bot once I come back, but I decided to do Dragona since I kinda want to wait and see what happens in the manga before I make a Jodio bot. I’ll also be remaking my three oldest bots since i’ve become way better at writing since I’ve joined this site!)

And if the bot gets their pronouns wrong, that’s probably Janitor’s fault.

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots. (But ONLY if you want to)📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
